text:
CYBER SECURITY AND THREAT
Cyber Security and Threat Analysis falls under the Advanced Technologies and Analysis Division of the Global Security Directorate. This group provides technical expertise to the U.S. Intelligence and Counterintelligence communities, secures critical infrastructure, cyber-physical systems, advanced manufacturing, and satellite technologies.
SRNL’s Cybersecurity and Virtual Reality Research and Development labs perform critical infrastructure tests, vulnerability assessments of various networked systems, develops data analytics competencies, and creates practical virtual reality applications that improve technological resiliency.
In order to meet these goals, SRNL has fostered positive collaborations with major NNSA partners such as:
